content:
# Recommendations — after session 1 (iter-001)

## Headline
**GR-quot lane DELIVERED.** `GrassmannianQuot.lean` 3→0; goal seed
`AlgebraicGeometry.Grassmannian.represents` sorry-free AND axiom-clean (no `sorryAx`). The primary
deliverable of this subproject is complete. No GR-quot prover work remains.

## Closest-to-completion / what to prioritize next
The GR-quot frontier is closed. Remaining open work is the deferred legs (per STRATEGY / TO_USER):
- **SNAP (`SectionGradedRing.lean`, ~10 sorries)** — DEFERRED, shared with sibling
  `FBC-B_SNAP-chain`. Do NOT prove locally from scratch; coordinate to import the sibling's finished
  proofs so encodings don't diverge. No prover payoff while deferred.
- **χ-blocked (`QuotScheme.lean`: `def:hilbert_polynomial`, `def:quot_functor`)** — keep as `sorry`;
  fillable only from the higher-cohomology leg this i=0 subproject lacks. NEVER build an H⁰ `Φ_s`
  under the χ label.

## Do NOT re-assign (blocked / out of scope)
- The two χ-blocked defs above (need cohomology engine absent here).
- SNAP stalkwise route — DEAD per ARCHON_MEMORY; SNAP stays sorry/import-from-sibling.

## Blueprint structural debt (blueprint-doctor, logs/iter-001/blueprint-doctor.md) — MEDIUM
Plan agent: this is cheap blueprint-prose/`\uses` hygiene (planner owns it), worth clearing before
any new prover lane on the affected chapters:
- **`Picard_GlueDescent.tex`** — 2 broken refs with no `\label`:
  `lem:gr_glueChartComponent_leg_compat`, `lem:gr_glueChartFamily_pullback_map_pi`. Either add the
  missing `\label`s (if the lemmas now exist in GlueDescent.lean) or drop the dangling `\cref`/`\uses`.
- **`Picard_QuotScheme.tex`** — 13 broken `\cref` (localization/descent lemma cluster). Likely a
  `\uses{}` block copy-pasted before targets were renamed; reconcile against the current Lean decls.
- **`Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`** — 7 broken `\cref`/`\uses` (sheafification/tensor cluster).
- **`Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`** — `% archon:covers` points at two NON-EXISTENT files
  (`Cohomology/FlatBaseChange.lean`, `Cohomology/FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean`) + 14 broken `\ref`. This
  is the dropped FBC leg (→ sibling). Recommend the planner either remove this chapter from
  `content.tex` (orphan it cleanly) or convert to a thin sibling pointer — it is out of scope here and
  pollutes the doctor report every iter.

## 1-to-1 coverage debt (`archon dag-query unmatched`) — LOW (standing, NOT this session)
326 `lean_aux` nodes have no blueprint entry. **None were created this session** (the prover added zero
new declarations — all 3 proofs reused existing lemmas + inlined an already-blueprinted identity).
This is a large pre-existing backlog inherited at extraction, not GR-quot scope. Flagging for
awareness; do not attribute to iter-001. If the planner wants to chip at it, prioritize nodes in the
GR cone (`AlgebraicGeometry.Grassmannian.*`) that feed `represents`.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered (also in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
1. **Post-`rw` diamond `X = X` → append explicit `rfl`.** Reducible auto-`rfl` misses syntactically-
   identical goals under the value-`ModuleCat` diamond. This is the real cause of the bogus
   "calc `Trans Eq Eq ?m`" errors. **Lesson for the planner: treat any future FIXME comment claiming a
   "calc-Trans toolchain bug" as a misdiagnosed diamond `rfl` gap, not a real blocker** — both such
   comments in this file were false and the sorries were fully closable.
2. **`epi_comp'` (explicit `Epi` args) over `epi_comp`** for morphisms under the diamond.
3. **`congrArg h |>.trans` over `rw [h]`** when `h`'s LHS carries an `IsIso`/instance argument
   (`rw` needs syntactic match; `.trans` only defeq).

## Minor (LOW) — note only
- `lean-vs-blueprint-checker` + `lean-auditor` both flagged 1 stale Lean docstring in
  `GrassmannianQuot.lean`. Review agent cannot edit `.lean`; a future prover/refactor touching the file
  can update it. Not blocking.
